utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists multiple entries with plan names and monthly costs for physical and mental health for individuals; although granular, it satisfies the requirement with costs specified. 2) property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists home-related coverages with monthly costs; this meets the requirement. 3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists travel items with monthly costs; satisfied. 4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan provides items with costs or referrals (two items are referrals without costs). Since the format requests 'with costs,' those two lack costs and are not fully specified. However, the overall 'additional_services' section includes at least some with costs but not all elements are costed; the item should be fully specified, so this is partially incomplete. 5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly, annual, and one-time fee; satisfied. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings and return its numeric rating. Health: EliteCare Premium Plan exists for both physical (rating 10) and mental health (rating 10). SecureLife Basic Plan exists for both physical and mental health (ratings 2 and 2). Property: EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10; Technology Protection rating 10; Home Office Protection rating 8. Travel: EliteTravel Premium Plan rating 10; Business Travel Support rating 10; 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 10. Additional services: Premium Insurance Membership rating 10; Claims Advocacy Service rating 9. The concierge medical retention and referrals are not in the ratings, so they are excluded.
